channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Running a marathon a day in 2024, she has a world record within her grasp
item.description: GHENT, Belgium (AP) — Finally coming to a halt on Tuesday — the last day of 2024 — Belgian ultra runner Hilde Dosogne felt she had done all to take the world record as the first woman to run a marathon every single day of the year.
item.dc:creator: RAF CASERT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lenny Randle, controversial former MLB infielder, dead at 75
item.description: Former Major League Baseball infielder Lenny Randle, who played for several teams over 12 years in the bigs, has died, the Seattle Mariners said. He was 75.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers report card: Disaster strikes as Detroit wallops Purdy, last-place Niners
item.description: The 49ers (6-10) turned in a typical second-half letdown in all aspects of their 40-34 defeat to the Detroit Lions in Monday's home finale.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: 6 former Florida State basketball players sue legendary coach over unpaid NIL compensation
item.description: Six former Florida State basketball players are suing longtime Seminoles head coach Leonard Hamilton over unpaid NIL compensation that totals $1.5 million
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kings' interim coach Doug Christie gets 1st win after taking over for Mike Brown
item.description: Doug Christie took over as the interim head coach of the Sacramento Kings amid a season-long losing streak, fans booing the team off their home court and questions surrounding the decision to fire Mike Brown, who led the franchise to its first playoff appearance in 16 years in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Eric He, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Warriors bludgeoned by Cavaliers to enter New Year
item.description: The Warriors looked like they were nowhere close to being in the same league as the first-place Cavaliers.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Westbrook has 'perfect' triple-double, 0 turnovers in Nuggets' 132-121 win over Jazz
item.description: Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets’ 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Coles, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Roki Sasaki might visit 1 or 2 teams before deciding which club he wants to sign with
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Prized Japanese free agent Roki Sasaki may visit one or two teams before deciding which club he wants to sign with.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The upperclassmen: Oregon, Ohio St. leaned on well-traveled veteran QBs to reach Rose Bowl, CFP
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Oregon and Ohio State are two of the most daunting teams left in the College Football Playoff in no small part because they've both got starting quarterbacks who had already seen — and beaten — just about everything they're ever going to face at this level of the sport before they
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: A jet carrying the Gonzaga men's basketball team ordered to stop to avoid collision at LAX
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration has launched an investigation after a private jet carrying the Gonzaga University men’s basketball team nearly crossed a runway as another flight was taking off at Los Angeles International Airport.
item.dc:creator: Stefanie Dazio And Jaimie Ding, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dak Prescott’s fianceé has $40,000 worth of goods stolen from car: report
item.description: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott's fianceé, Sarah Ramos, had nearly $40,000 of goods stolen from her vehicle just one day before Luka Doncic's home was burglarized.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SDFNL All-Star Showcase
item.description:
Boys All-Star Game : Blue Stars 21- Red Stars 17
Girls Flag Football All-Star Game: Blue Stars 6 - Red Stars 0
San Diego 13U Youth Super Bowl: San Diego Bolts 34 - Oceanside Warriors 22
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: NBC omits 'Redskins' from ex-star QB's jersey as Jayden Daniels sets franchise mark, draws fan backlash
item.description: NBC omitted the name "Redskins" from a graphic comparing Jayden Daniels and Robert Griffin III on Sunday as the Washington Commanders rookie set a record.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: All smiles as Djokovic and Kyrgios treat crowd to flashy shots in doubles win
item.description: BRISBANE, Australia (AP) — Exchanging smiles, laughs and flashy shots, Novak Djokovic and Nick Kyrgios teamed up in doubles on Monday as they both returned to the court in preparation for the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bills clinch the AFC's No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the undisciplined Jets
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen reflected on Buffalo’s many offseason critics and doubters when asked about the Bills achieving their latest milestones while sewing up the AFC’s No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the unraveling and undisciplined New York Jets on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFC's No. 1 seed comes down to Vikings-Lions showdown at Detroit in Week 18
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed will come down to the final game of the regular season when the Detroit Lions host the Minnesota Vikings next Sunday night. The winner takes the NFC North and gets a first-round playoff bye and home-field advantage until the Super Bowl. The loser becomes the No.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: The path of Matthew Stafford looms for Caleb Williams
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — A skilled quarterback burdened by the dysfunction of his organization, doomed to toil in mediocrity for over a decade despite a high level of performance year in and year out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bears lose rain-soaked rock fight to the Seahawks, drop franchise record-tying 10th straight game
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears final home game of the season against the Seattle Seahawks was offense optional, as rain poured down on Soldier Field in what amounted to a cold, wet rock fight. "I thought special teams played very well.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs Seahawks Preview: Inactives, Caleb Williams' development and a shot at the wrong kind of history
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — For the last time this season, the Chicago Bears will take to Soldier Field with a bit of dubious history on the line. The Bears (4-11) are losers of nine straight and will take on a Seattle Seahawks squad (8-7) who's playoff hopes dangle in the balance.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
